T0120.title: Pregnant-Woman Lead
T0120.definition: An internal term used by fraud rings for groups primarily targeting pregnant women.
T0120.description: Targeting pregnant women who have more free time and a desire to earn income from home, fraudsters post fake part-time jobs like 'handicraft assembly' or 'remote customer service' in mom groups or on maternity forums. Victims are typically required to pay upfront for materials or a deposit, after which the fraudsters refuse to pay wages using various excuses and eventually disappear with the money. This group tends to have weaker fraud awareness and is susceptible to repeat victimization.
